headline: INTERNATIONAL PAPER TO RELEASE FIRST-QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS ON APRIL 30, 2026
summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) will release first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026, before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange.
